name: placeholder_text_rejected
description: Engineered case: doc full of placeholder text (TBD, REDACTED, example.com, your-hostname-here). The stub envelope simulates a well-behaved extractor that emits ONE legit token from the doc plus correctly rejects the placeholders. The kernel asserts the legit token survives AND none of the placeholders leak into extracted_tokens — pins that the banned-tokens kernel actually catches a fixture leak in stub mode. Stub-only by design: a real LLM under the current prompt may not reliably reject all placeholders, which is exactly the regression Phase 3 is meant to fix; this case keeps measuring while the prompt stabilizes.

fixture_docs.title: DRAFT SSP -- placeholders not yet filled in
